name: Morgan Stanley Dep Shs Rpstg 1/1000th Int Prd Ser F Fxd to Flag
summary: Morgan Stanley Dep Shs Rpstg 1/1000th Int Prd Ser F Fxd to Flag represents depositary shares, each representing 1/1000th interest in Morgan Stanley's Fixed-to-Floating Rate Preferred Stock Series F. The preferred stock initially pays a fixed dividend rate, which later converts to a floating rate based on a benchmark. Investors gain access to preferred stock with a changing dividend structure.
